sub_modules.conv2d_window_update: Combinational horizontal stencil shifter and flattened KxK window formatter with zero left-padding at line starts.
sub_modules.conv2d_valid_region: Combinational valid generator that asserts after the configured stencil radius of rows and columns has been buffered.
sub_modules.conv2d_coeff_rom: Combinational coefficient provider. The default 3x3 kernel is the Gaussian-style [1 2 1; 2 4 2; 1 2 1] kernel; other sizes default to identity.
sub_modules.conv2d_dot_product: Combinational matrix-vector dot product over the flattened pixel window and flattened coefficient vector.
sub_modules.conv2d_output_cast: Combinational signed accumulator-to-output cast with clamp-to-zero for negative values and saturation for overflow.
